title: Socket Breeze Socket Fan Light with Remote Control, Portable Small Ceiling Fans with Lights for Bedroom, Kitchen, Living Room, with Dimming Function, 1000 Lumens, Screws into E26/E27
features: Fan light size: diameter 16.54 inches, height 6.29 inches, weight 1 pound. Fan power: 12 watts, light power: 10 watts.Voltage: 85V -265V,Main functions: dimming function, timing function, three speed wind speed function selection,Night light mode.

Easy installation: The installation method of this socket ceiling fan is as simple as that of a regular light bulb, and it is completely wireless, without causing any clutter. The E26/E27 base is compatible with most light bulb sockets.

Multi functional dimming LED light: The fan light is equipped with an 10 watt LED light, which is environmentally friendly and has a longer service life. Color temperature options include cold white, warm light , natural light , brightness adjustment function of 10% -100%, Night light mode.

quality assurance： in order to protect the rights and interests of consumers, our brand strictly controls the quality to ensure that there is no problem.
